name: Ahmad ibn Hasan
title: Epic Teenager
shortDescription: Another teenage son of Imam Hasan (AS) whose name is recorded in some historical texts as one of the heroes of Ashura.
fullStory:
Ahmad ibn Hasan (AS) was another young relic of Imam Hasan al-Mujtaba (AS) in Karbala. In some historical sources and Maqatil (like Tarikh al-Yaqubi), he is named alongside his brothers Qasim, Abu Bakr, and Abdullah as martyrs of Karbala.

Raised in a family of pure light and bravery, Ahmad witnessed the unjust martyrdom of the companions and Hashemite youths on Ashura. His love for his uncle Imam Hussain (AS) and his Hashemite zeal did not allow him to sit idle.

With a teenage stature but a grand spirit, he sought permission from the Imam and charged into the massive Kufan army with his weapon. He recited epic poetry and fought bravely against enemies devoid of humanity.

Eventually, this devoted teenager, like his brothers, was surrounded by the enemy and attained the grace of martyrdom through ruthless sword and spear strikes, breathing his last in his uncle's embrace.
quoteArabic: وَقُتِلَ مِن وُلْدِ الحَسَنِ: أَبُوبَكْرٍ، وَعَبْدُاللَّهِ، وَالقاسِمُ، وَأَحْمَدُ...
quote: (Tarikh al-Yaqubi:) And from the sons of Hasan (AS), these were killed: Abu Bakr, Abdullah, Qasim, and Ahmad...
